channel.title: Posts on DevLogs
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on DevLogs

item.title: [citadel@nixos:~]$ whoami
item.description:
Hi, I’m Karanveer.

I build practical software and systems—mostly in C, Python, and Go—and I like working close to how things actually run.

I’ve shipped IIoT projects such as:

  • Production Monitoring System
  • Energy Monitoring System
  • Engine Hot Bed Monitoring System

I’m into:

  • clean tooling and reproducible setups
  • low-level and networking projects
  • embedded/PLCs when software meets real machines

I care about reliability, observability, and shipping.
